query: Deploy n8n in queue mode on my server (root@203.0.113.10) at automation.acme.io — we run a lot of executions and need workers. Timezone Europe/Warsaw.
expected_behavior: Activate n8n-self-hosting and proceed in queue mode (user explicitly asked)
Use the queue template (docker-compose.queue.yml): caddy + postgres + redis + n8n main + n8n-worker replicas
Explain queue architecture: main enqueues, workers execute; Redis = queue; Postgres = shared DB (required — SQLite not supported in queue mode)
Stress that the SAME N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY must reach main AND every worker (the x-n8n anchor handles it), or workers can't decrypt credentials
Generate fresh secrets ON the box: N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY plus POSTGRES_PASSWORD and POSTGRES_NON_ROOT_PASSWORD (openssl rand), written only into .env (chmod 600)
Keep internal services private: do not publish 5678 / 5432 / 6379 to the host; only Caddy is public
Preflight DNS A record for automation.acme.io → 203.0.113.10 and ports 80/443 before launch
Note queue RAM needs (~4 GB floor, ~1–2 GB per worker) and how to scale workers (replicas / --scale)
Verify: postgres+redis healthy, main+workers Up, cert obtained, https://.../healthz ok, a worker logs an executed job
notes: Queue mode must use Postgres + Redis + workers, share the encryption key across all n8n processes, generate fresh secrets on the box, and never publish internal ports.
